title: Lab 05: Users Groups And Sudo
description: Create local users on server with minimal useradd usage and delegated sudo rules.

tasks: Create the group opsrune and the users brenor, lyessa, and quillan. Create brenor and lyessa with opsrune as a supplementary group at creation time. Create sarahx without a home directory and with the shell /sbin/nologin.
Set the passwords of brenor, lyessa, and quillan to cinder9.
Allow members of opsrune to run /usr/sbin/useradd through sudo, and allow brenor to run /usr/bin/passwd for other users without a sudo password prompt.
hints: Use useradd -G when the supplementary group is known at account creation time.
Use visudo to edit sudo policy safely. Plain visudo as root is fine unless a task explicitly requires a drop-in file.
checks: # server getent group opsrune >/dev/null && id -nG brenor | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && id -nG lyessa | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && getent passwd quillan >/dev/null && getent passwd sarahx | awk -F: '{exit !($7=="/sbin/nologin")}' && test ! -d /home/sarahx

# server getent shadow brenor | awk -F: '{ok=(length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/)} END{exit !ok}' && getent shadow lyessa | awk -F: '{ok=(length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/)} END{exit !ok}' && getent shadow quillan | awk -F: '{ok=(length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/)} END{exit !ok}'
solution_outline: Create the group and all four accounts on server.
Set passwords only for the interactive accounts.
Write two sudo drop-ins and validate them with visudo.
task_titles: Create opsrune and the required users
Set the interactive user passwords to cinder9
